omitted_declarations.policy_reference: When you create an account with us, you provide us with personal information that includes your name and email address. You can also choose to add a phone number or payment information to your account.

When you create an account with us, you provide us with personal information that includes your name and email address. You can also choose to add a phone number or payment information to your account.

When you create an account with us, you provide us with personal information that includes your name and email address. You can also choose to add a phone number or payment information to your account.

We may also collect information about your location when you use our services, which helps us offer features like directions. Your location can be determined with varying degrees of accuracy by: GPS and other sensor data from your device, IP address, Things near your device, such as Wi-Fi access points, cell towers, and Bluetooth-enabled devices.
